items.briefing:
Google Cloud has launched new AI-powered threat defence tools, which may benefit Australian organisations using their platform to better detect and respond to cyberattacks. Separately, researchers are warning that cybercriminals are now using AI to develop attack methods faster than security scanners can detect them — meaning standard security tools may increasingly miss new threats.

A useful reminder for all staff: if you ever suspect a data breach has occurred — such as receiving unexpected password reset emails or noticing unusual account activity — report it to your IT or security team immediately rather than waiting to be certain.

featured.title: Kinetic IT report flags AI & sovereign execution gap
featured.quote: Australian agencies lack funding and skills to safely deploy AI amid sovereign tech pressures.
